problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
